title: dianthus orientalis
intro: Dianthus orientalis, also known as the Chinese pink or pink grass, is a perennial flowering plant native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Dianthus orientalis include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and promoting digestion. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including respiratory issues and digestive problems.
